subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! This is a servant who hath turned with his whole being unto the Dawning-Place of lights, the Day-Spring of divine tokens, and the Source of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد توجه بکلیته الی مطلع الأنوار و مشرق الآثار و مهبط الأسرار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
